channel.title: KillBait RSS Feed
channel.description: KillBait - News highlights delivered clearly and responsibly—no clickbait, no sensationalism

item.title: Collingwood’s reliance on veteran stars exposed again in narrow loss to Western Bulldogs
item.description: Collingwood’s 97-93 loss to the Western Bulldogs has intensified concerns about the club’s direction and overreliance on a small group of senior players. Despite outstanding performances from Nick Dai...

item.title: Arafat Minhas Takes Five Wickets on ODI Debut as Pakistan Beat Australia in Rawalpindi
item.description: In a remarkable milestone for Pakistan cricket, the national team defeated Australia by five wickets in the first ODI played at Rawalpindi. Spinner Arafat Minhas made history as the first home bowler ...

item.title: California health officials warn against foraging wild mushrooms amid record poisoning cases
item.description: California public health officials are urging residents to avoid picking or consuming wild mushrooms following a sharp and unprecedented rise in poisoning cases across the state. Since November, autho...

item.title: Authorities raise alarm over drug-laced food products in Tanzania
item.description: Authorities in Tanzania are currently facing a serious public health and security concern following the discovery of narcotic substances being concealed within common food products. Reports indicate t...

item.title: FIA bans active aero at Monaco, limiting overtaking opportunities
item.description: The FIA has decided that Formula One’s new active aero system, known as 'straight mode', will not be used at the Monaco Grand Prix due to safety concerns and the track's unsuitability. This system, de...

item.title: Coco Gauff eliminated in third round of Roland Garros by Anastasia Potapova
item.description: Coco Gauff, the defending champion at Roland Garros, suffered an unexpected defeat in the third round, losing to Austria's Anastasia Potapova. The fourth-seeded Gauff fell 4-6, 7-6, 6-4 in a two-and-a...

item.title: Top NDC Leaders Attend Abuja Convention Ahead of 2027 Presidential Primaries
item.description: Na Saturday, for Abuja, top political big men like Peter Obi, former Anambra State Governor; Rabiu Kwankwaso, former Kano State Governor; and Senator Seriake Dickson, the National Leader of NDC, show ...

item.title: Comparing Norway and Australia’s management of resource wealth
item.description: Australia’s resources boom has sparked debate over whether the nation has maximised public benefit compared to Norway, which established a $3.2 trillion sovereign wealth fund from its oil and gas sect...

item.title: Kitui Man Dies at Witchdoctor's Home After Allegedly Facing Curse for Adultery
item.description: A 42-year-old man, Syengo Kimwele, from Kitui County, died under mysterious circumstances while seeking help from a well-known witchdoctor to lift a curse reportedly linked to an extramarital affair. ...

item.title: Jake Tapper and critics react to Trump suggesting himself as entertainment for a state fair event
item.description: According to the article, U.S. President Donald Trump sparked widespread reactions after proposing that he personally replace musical performers at a planned event tied to the Great American State Fai...

item.title: Guyana’s Oil Revenue Surges Amid Iran Crisis, Raising Economic Opportunities and Challenges
item.description: Guyana, once one of South America’s poorest countries, is experiencing unprecedented economic growth due to its rapidly expanding oil sector. The recent conflict between the U.S. and Israel with Iran ...

item.title: BJP MP warns on reduced movement for TMC leaders after mob attack on Abhishek Banerjee
item.description: This article reports on remarks by BJP Rajya Sabha MP Rahul Sinha following an incident in West Bengal where TMC national general secretary Abhishek Banerjee was assaulted by a mob during a visit to S...

item.title: Six killed and four hurt in Kimanzichana bus-minibus accident
item.description: On Saturday, May 30, 2026, a tragic accident occurred in Kimanzichana area, Mkuranga District, Coast Region, leaving six people dead and four others injured. The crash happened around 11 am when a Mah...

item.title: Democratic Representative Calls Trump an Adjudicated Rapist on MSNBC, Host Issues Terminology Clarification
item.description: During a Saturday afternoon segment on MSNBC's MS NOW, host Alex Witt interviewed Rep. Melanie Stansbury (D-NM) about former Attorney General Pam Bondi's combative appearance before the House Oversigh...

item.title: Eldoret residents see water tariffs reduced by 46 shillings per unit after stakeholder talks
item.description: Residents of Eldoret in Uasin Gishu County will benefit from a reduction in water tariffs, with the price per unit dropping by KSh 46. The decrease follows structured discussions among Eldoret Water a...

item.title: Peter Obi Nominates Rabiu Musa Kwankwaso as Running Mate After Securing NDC Presidential Ticket for 2027
item.description: Peter Obi, the presidential candidate of the Nigeria Democratic Congress (NDC) for the 2027 general election, has nominated former Kano State Governor, Rabiu Musa Kwankwaso, as his vice-presidential c...

item.title: Anambra Government Gives Mortuary Operators June 5 Deadline for Registration and Licence Renewal
item.description: The Anambra State Government has directed all mortuary owners and operators across the state to register their facilities or renew expired licences as part of ongoing reforms aimed at strengthening re...

item.title: Poll suggests millions of UK voters were exposed to political deepfakes before local elections
item.description: New polling commissioned by the cross-party think tank Demos indicates that political deepfakes have become a significant issue in the United Kingdom's electoral environment. According to a survey of ...

item.title: Five People Rescued from Laos Cave After Over a Week Trapped
item.description: A daring rescue operation in Laos successfully brought five people out of a remote cave after they had been trapped for more than a week. The mission, described as complex and challenging, involved sp...

item.title: Security Forces Neutralise Eight Militants in Darra Adamkhel During Ongoing Operation
item.description: On Saturday, security forces in Khyber Pakhtunkhwa’s Darra Adamkhel successfully killed eight militants, including two Afghan nationals linked to the banned Tariq Gidar group, an affiliate of the pros...
